phase_title: Account-token authorization for explicit Railway environment creation
activation_note: Only ACCOUNT-TOKEN-PROJECT-PREFLIGHT-READONLY is approved. It permits one read-only Railway Public GraphQL primary query and one schema-correction query only after schema_contract_failed; authentication, authorization, and transport failures are not retryable. Only project ID/name and environment ID/name may be read. STAGING-ENVIRONMENT-CREATE-ACCOUNT-TOKEN remains unapproved; no mutation or create is authorized. Governance publication alone does not execute the gate.

authorized_gate.auth_transport: Authorization Bearer from secure process environment

last_result.summary: The project-scoped RAILWAY_TOKEN could not establish project-wide environment identity through the Railway Public GraphQL API. No create mutation was attempted. A successor using an account/workspace-scoped API token is required.
